description_long: This is a hand-crafted ceramic vase with a wide, flared rim and a rounded body that tapers slightly towards the base. The exterior surface is adorned with raised, swirling and oval-shaped decorative motifs, giving it a textured and tactile appearance. The coloration transitions from dark brown to lighter beige and grayish tones, with some areas showing subtle gradients and natural firing marks. The rim is uneven and organic, suggesting artisanal craftsmanship rather than industrial production. The vase's surface finish is matte and slightly rough, with visible imperfections and tool marks that add to its rustic charm. This vessel appears sturdy and is likely intended for decorative use in an outdoor or public urban setting.
description: A rustic, hand-crafted ceramic vase with raised swirling motifs and a wide, uneven rim. The surface features earthy tones and a matte, textured finish.
description_view_0: This view highlights the dark brown coloration and the prominent raised swirl and oval motifs on the front side.
description_view_1: This angle shows a lighter beige surface with more pronounced oval decorations and a clearer view of the uneven rim.
description_view_2: The vase appears mostly grayish here, with the decorative motifs blending more subtly into the body.
description_view_3: This side displays a mix of dark and light tones, with the swirling motifs wrapping around the body and the rim's irregularity visible.
